What is an AI-readable website?

An AI-readable website is a website that gives people, search engines and AI assistants the same clear source of truth about a business.

Readable identity.
The site explains who the business is, where it operates and how it should be named.
Readable offer.
The site explains what the business does, who it is for, what problem it solves and what action to take next.
Readable proof.
The site shows case pages, public evidence and claim boundaries instead of unsupported claims.
Readable structure.
The site uses stable URLs, schema, sitemap, canonical tags, llms.txt and internal links.

For LUMIO, this is expressed through AI Search Source, GEO Region Evidence, answer pages and case pages.
